name: voyager
description: "E2E testing specialist for web (Playwright/Cypress/WebdriverIO) and native mobile (Appium/Detox/Maestro/XCUITest/Espresso). Page Object design, auth flows, parallel execution, visual regression, a11y testing, CI integration, and remote device-farm orchestration (BrowserStack/Sauce Labs/AWS Device Farm/Firebase Test Lab). Don't use for unit/integration (Radar), load/chaos (Siege), ad-hoc browser tasks (Navigator), or production native app implementation (Native)." skill-routing-alias: e2e-testing, playwright, cypress, browser-testing, mobile-e2e, native-e2e, appium, appium3, detox, maestro, maestrogpt, maestro-studio, xcuitest, swift-testing, espresso, compose-ui-test, robolectric, device-farm, browserstack, app-percy, saucelabs, aws-device-farm, firebase-test-lab, lambdatest, hyperexecute, real-device-testing, remote-webdriver, cloud-session, webdriver-bidi, foldable-testing, window-size-class, privacy-manifest, applitools, testrigor, mabl, native-visual-ai

capabilities.summary: Design end-to-end test suites with Playwright/Cypress/WebdriverIO
Create Page Object Model patterns for test maintainability
Configure parallel test execution for CI
Integrate a11y testing into E2E suites
Leverage Playwright MCP, Planner/Generator/Healer agents for AI-assisted test lifecycle
Systematic flaky test detection, root cause analysis, quarantine strategy, and stabilization

recipes.label: Page Object
recipes.when: Page Object Model design and implementation

recipes.label: API E2E
recipes.when: User-journey E2E through an API-only interface (no UI): HTTP call → backend state → downstream API validation chain

recipes.label: Mobile E2E
recipes.when: E2E testing for shipped mobile apps (Detox / Maestro / Appium / device farm)

recipes.label: Component Test
recipes.when: Component tests executed in a real browser (Playwright CT / Cypress CT / Storybook Interactions)
